fields.name: GPIO_OUT_DATA
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 output register. Bit10 corresponds to GPIO0, bit11 corresponds to GPIO1, etc.

RTC_IO.name: RTC_GPIO_OUT_W1TS
RTC_IO.description: RTC GPIO output bit set register

fields.name: GPIO_OUT_DATA_W1TS
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 output set register. If the value 1 is written to a bit here, the corresponding bit in RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_OUT_REG will be set to 1. Recommended operation: use this register to set RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_OUT_REG.

RTC_IO.name: RTC_GPIO_OUT_W1TC
RTC_IO.description: RTC GPIO output bit clear register

fields.name: GPIO_OUT_DATA_W1TC
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 output clear register. If the value 1 is written to a bit here, the corresponding bit in RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_OUT_REG will be cleared. Recommended operation: use this register to clear RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_OUT_REG.

fields.name: REG_RTCIO_REG_GPIO_ENABLE
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 output enable. Bit10 corresponds to GPIO0, bit11 corresponds to GPIO1, etc. If the bit is set to 1, it means this GPIO pad is output.

RTC_IO.name: RTC_GPIO_ENABLE_W1TS
RTC_IO.description: RTC GPIO output enable bit set register

fields.name: REG_RTCIO_REG_GPIO_ENABLE_W1TS
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 output enable set register. If the value 1 is written to a bit here, the corresponding bit in RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_ENABLE_REG will be set to 1. Recommended operation: use this register to set RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_ENABLE_REG.

RTC_IO.name: RTC_GPIO_ENABLE_W1TC
RTC_IO.description: RTC GPIO output enable bit clear register

fields.name: REG_RTCIO_REG_GPIO_ENABLE_W1TC
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 output enable clear register. If the value 1 is written to a bit here, the corresponding bit in RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_ENABLE_REG will be cleared. Recommended operation: use this register to clear RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_ENABLE_REG.

fields.name: GPIO_STATUS_INT
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 interrupt status register. Bit10 corresponds to GPIO0, bit11 corresponds to GPIO1, etc. This register should be used together with RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_PINn_INT_TYPE in RTCIO_RTC_GPIO_PINn_REG. 0: no interrupt; 1: corresponding interrupt.

RTC_IO.name: RTC_GPIO_STATUS_W1TS
RTC_IO.description: RTC GPIO interrupt status bit set register

fields.name: GPIO_STATUS_INT_W1TS
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 interrupt set register. If the value 1 is written to a bit here, the corresponding bit in RTCIO_GPIO_STATUS_INT will be set to 1. Recommended operation: use this register to set RTCIO_GPIO_STATUS_INT.

RTC_IO.name: RTC_GPIO_STATUS_W1TC
RTC_IO.description: RTC GPIO interrupt status bit clear register

fields.name: GPIO_STATUS_INT_W1TC
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 interrupt clear register. If the value 1 is written to a bit here, the corresponding bit in RTCIO_GPIO_STATUS_INT will be cleared. Recommended operation: use this register to clear RTCIO_GPIO_STATUS_INT.

fields.name: GPIO_IN_NEXT
fields.description: GPIO0 ~ 21 input value. Bit10 corresponds to GPIO0, bit11 corresponds to GPIO1, etc. Each bit represents a pad input value, 1 for high level, and 0 for low level.

fields.name: GPIO_PIN_PAD_DRIVER
fields.description: Pad driver selection. 0: normal output. 1: open drain.

fields.name: GPIO_PIN_INT_TYPE
fields.description: GPIO interrupt type selection. 0: GPIO interrupt disabled. 1: rising edge trigger. 2: falling edge trigger. 3: any edge trigger. 4: low level trigger. 5: high level trigger.

fields.name: GPIO_PIN_WAKEUP_ENABLE
fields.description: GPIO wake-up enable. This will only wake up ESP32-S2 from Light-sleep.

fields.name: FUN_IE
fields.description: Input enable in normal execution.

fields.name: SLP_OE
fields.description: Output enable in sleep mode.

fields.name: SLP_IE
fields.description: Input enable in sleep mode.

fields.name: SLP_SEL
fields.description: 0: no sleep mode. 1: enable sleep mode.

fields.name: FUN_SEL
fields.description: Function selection.

fields.name: MUX_SEL
fields.description: Connect the RTC pad input to digital pad input.  0 is available.

fields.name: XPD
fields.description: Touch sensor power on.

fields.name: TIE_OPT
fields.description: The tie option of touch sensor. 0: tie low. 1: tie high.

fields.name: START
fields.description: Start touch sensor.

fields.name: DAC
fields.description: Touch sensor slope control. 3-bit for each touch pad, defaults to 0x4.

fields.name: RUE
fields.description: Pull-down enable of the pad. 1: internal pull-down enabled. 0: internal pull-down disabled.

fields.name: RDE
fields.description: Pull-up enable of the pad. 1: internal pull-up enabled. 0: internal pull-up disabled.

fields.name: DRV
fields.description: Select the drive strength of the pad. 0: ~5 mA. 1: ~10 mA. 2: ~20 mA. 3: ~40 mA.

fields.description: Touch sensor slope control. 3-bit for each touch pad, defaults to 0x4.

fields.name: RUE
fields.description: Pull-down enable of the pad. 1: internal pull-down enabled. 0: internal pull-down disabled.

fields.name: RDE
fields.description: Pull-up enable of the pad. 1: internal pull-up enabled. 0: internal pull-up disabled.

fields.name: DRV
fields.description: Select the drive strength of the pad. 0: ~5 mA. 1: ~10 mA. 2: ~20 mA. 3: ~40 mA.

fields.name: FUN_IE
fields.description: Input enable in normal execution.

fields.name: SLP_OE
fields.description: Output enable in sleep mode.

fields.name: SLP_IE
fields.description: Input enable in sleep mode.

fields.name: SLP_SEL
fields.description: 0: no sleep mode. 1: enable sleep mode.

fields.name: FUN_SEL
fields.description: Function selection.

fields.name: MUX_SEL
fields.description: Connect the RTC pad input to digital pad input.  0 is available.

fields.name: XPD
fields.description: Touch sensor power on.

fields.name: TIE_OPT
fields.description: The tie option of touch sensor. 0: tie low. 1: tie high.

fields.name: PDAC1_DAC
fields.description: Configure DAC_1 output when RTCIO_PDAC1_DAC_XPD_FORCE is set to 1.

fields.name: PDAC1_XPD_DAC
fields.description: When RTCIO_PDAC1_DAC_XPD_FORCE is set to 1, 1: enable DAC_1 output. 0: disable DAC_1 output.

fields.name: PDAC1_DAC_XPD_FORCE
fields.description: 1: use RTCIO_PDAC1_XPD_DAC to control DAC_1 output. 0: use SAR ADC FSM to control DAC_1 output.

fields.description: Input enable in normal execution.

fields.name: PDAC1_SLP_OE

fields.name: PDAC1_DRV
fields.description: Select the drive strength of the pad. 0: ~5 mA. 1: ~10 mA. 2: ~20 mA. 3: ~40 mA.

fields.name: SEL
fields.description:
GPIO[0-17] can be used to wake up the chip when the chip is in the sleep mode. This register prompts the pad source to wake up the chip when the latter is indeep/light sleep mode. 
0: select GPIO0; 1: select GPIO2, etc

RTC_IO.name: XTL_EXT_CTR
RTC_IO.description: Crystal power down enable GPIO source

fields.name: SEL
fields.description: Select the external crystal power down enable source to get into sleep mode. 0: select GPIO0. 1: select GPIO1, etc. The input value on this pin XOR RTC_CNTL_EXT_XTL_CONF_REG[30] is the crystal power down enable signal.

fields.name: SAR_I2C_SCL_SEL
fields.description: Selects a pad the RTC I2C SCL signal connects to. 0: use TOUCH PAD0. 1: use TOUCH PAD2.

fields.name: SAR_I2C_SDA_SEL
fields.description: Selects a pad the RTC I2C SDA signal connects to. 0: use TOUCH PAD1. 1: use TOUCH PAD3.

fields.name: IO_DATE
fields.description: Version control register

fields.name: ULP_CP_PC_INIT
fields.description: ULP coprocessor PC initial address

fields.name: ULP_CP_GPIO_WAKEUP_ENA
fields.description:
Enable the option of ULP coprocessor woken up by
RTC GPIO

fields.name: ULP_CP_GPIO_WAKEUP_CLR
fields.description:
Disable the option of ULP coprocessor woken up by
RTC GPIO

fields.name: ULP_CP_SLP_TIMER_EN
fields.description:
ULP coprocessor timer enable bit. 0: Disable hardware
Timer. 1: Enable hardware timer

fields.name: ULP_CP_CLK_FO
fields.description: ULP-FSM clock force on

fields.name: ULP_CP_RESET
fields.description: ULP-FSM clock software reset

fields.name: ULP_CP_FORCE_START_TOP
fields.description: Write 1 to start ULP-FSM by software

fields.name: ULP_CP_START_TOP
fields.description: Write 1 to start ULP-FSM

fields.name: COCPU_CLK_FO
fields.description: ULP-RISCV clock force on

fields.name: COCPU_START_2_RESET_DIS
fields.description: Time from ULP-RISCV startup to pull down reset

fields.name: COCPU_START_2_INTR_EN
fields.description:
Time from ULP-RISCV startup to send out
RISCV_START_INT interrupt

fields.name: COCPU_SHUT
fields.description: Shut down ULP-RISCV

fields.name: COCPU_SHUT_2_CLK_DIS
fields.description: Time from shut down ULP-RISCV to disable clock

fields.name: COCPU_SHUT_RESET_EN
fields.description: This bit is used to reset ULP-RISCV

fields.name: COCPU_SEL
fields.description: 0: select ULP-RISCV. 1: select ULP-FSM

fields.name: COCPU_DONE_FORCE
fields.description:
0: select ULP-FSM DONE signal. 1: select ULP-RISCV DONE
signal

fields.name: COCPU_DONE
fields.description:
DONE signal. Write 1 to this bit, ULP-RISCV will go to HALT and the
timer starts counting

fields.name: COCPU_SW_INT_TRIGGER
fields.description: Trigger ULP-RISCV register interrupt

RTC_CNTL.name: ULP_CP_TIMER_1
RTC_CNTL.description: Configure sleep cycle of the timer

fields.name: ULP_CP_TIMER_SLP_CYCLE
fields.description: Set sleep cycles for ULP coprocessor timer

RTC_I2C.name: SCL_LOW
RTC_I2C.description: Configure the low level width of SCL

fields.name: PERIOD
fields.description:
This register is used to configure how many clock cycles SCL
remains low.

fields.name: SDA_FORCE_OUT
fields.description: SDA output mode. 0: open drain. 1: push pull.

fields.name: SCL_FORCE_OUT
fields.description: SCL output mode. 0: open drain. 1: push pull.

fields.name: MS_MODE
fields.description: Set this bit to configure RTC I²C as a master.

fields.name: TRANS_START
fields.description: Set this bit to 1, RTC I2C starts sending data.

fields.name: TX_LSB_FIRST
fields.description:
This bit is used to control the sending mode. 0: send data from the most
significant bit. 1: send data from the least significant bit.

fields.name: RX_LSB_FIRST
fields.description:
This bit is used to control the storage mode for received data. 0: receive
data from the most significant bit. 1: receive data from the least significant bit.

fields.name: CLK_GATE_EN
fields.description: RTC I²C controller clock gate.

fields.name: RESET
fields.description: RTC I²C software reset.

fields.name: CLK_EN
fields.description: rtc i2c reg clk gating

fields.name: ACK_REC
fields.description: The received ACK value. 0: ACK. 1: NACK.

fields.name: SLAVE_RW
fields.description: 0: master writes to slave. 1: master reads from slave.

fields.name: ARB_LOST
fields.description: When the RTC I2C loses control of SCL line, the register changes to 1.

fields.name: BUS_BUSY
fields.description: 0: RTC I2C bus is in idle state. 1: RTC I2C bus is busy transferring data.

fields.name: SLAVE_ADDRESSED
fields.description:
When the address sent by the master matches the address of the
slave, then this bit will be set.

fields.name: BYTE_TRANS
fields.description: This field changes to 1 when one byte is transferred.

fields.name: OP_CNT
fields.description: Indicate which operation is working.

fields.name: SHIFT
fields.description: shifter content

fields.name: SCL_MAIN_STATE_LAST
fields.description: i2c last main status

fields.name: SCL_STATE_LAST
fields.description: scl last status

fields.name: TIME_OUT
fields.description: Timeout threshold

fields.name: SLAVE_ADDR
fields.description: slave address

fields.name: ADDR_10BIT_EN
fields.description: This field is used to enable the slave 10-bit addressing mode.

RTC_I2C.name: SCL_HIGH
RTC_I2C.description: Configure the high level width of SCL

fields.name: PERIOD
fields.description: This register is used to configure how many cycles SCL remains high.

RTC_I2C.name: SDA_DUTY
RTC_I2C.description:
Configure the SDA hold time after a negative
SCL edge

fields.name: NUM
fields.description:
The number of clock cycles between the SDA switch and the falling
edge of SCL.

RTC_I2C.name: SCL_START_PERIOD
RTC_I2C.description:
Configure the delay between the SDA and SCL
negative edge for a start condition

fields.name: SCL_START_PERIOD
fields.description: Number of clock cycles to wait after generating a start condition.

RTC_I2C.name: SCL_STOP_PERIOD
RTC_I2C.description: Configure the delay between SDA and SCL positive edge for a stop condition

fields.name: SCL_STOP_PERIOD
fields.description: Number of clock cycles to wait before generating a stop condition.

fields.description: When command 14 is done, this bit changes to 1.

fields.name: COMMAND15
fields.description:
Content of command 15. For more information, please refer to the register
I2C_COMD15_REG in Chapter I²C Controller.

fields.name: COMMAND15_DONE
fields.description: When command 15 is done, this bit changes to 1.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: Version control register

SENS.name: SAR_SLAVE_ADDR1

fields.description: RTC I2C slave address 1

fields.description: RTC I2C slave address 0

fields.name: SAR_I2C_CTRL
fields.description:
RTC I2C control data. Active only when SENS_SAR_I2C_START_FORCE =
1.

fields.name: SAR_I2C_START
fields.description: Start RTC I2C. Active only when SENS_SAR_I2C_START_FORCE = 1

fields.name: SAR_I2C_START_FORCE
fields.description: 0: RTC I2C started by FSM. 1: RTC I2C started by software.
